title: Naan Soodana Mogini Lyrics Paayum Puli 2015
stanzas:
variyaa maapula variyaa
variyaa maamane variyaa
enna thottu pottu pogaama
kattikittu pogathan

variyaa maapula variyaa
Ye variyaa maamane variyaa
Ye variyaa maapula variyaa
Variyaa machaane variyaa

koadi pazhamiruku
koyya thopula.
nee sodi pazham ketta
Niyamey illa.

samacha kari irukku
sandha kadayila.
nee samanja ponna ketta
niyamey illa.

sothezhuthi thanthaalum
vara maaten
kaththi vachu ketalum
thara maaten

parambaraiya koothu
padaichathu naanga
itha panangaasku vikka
mudiyaathu ponga (2)

ennai kadhalipor ayiram undu
ana enna katikida
nibanthana undu.

unakku vaakupada
enakku aasathaan
aana enaku muthal purusan
indha aatam thaan.

aambalaiku adupu ootha
vara maten
pulla pethu thaadina
thara maten

nibanthanaiku kattupattavuga vaanga
illa neettipadukka
veetukku veetukku ponga (2)

variyaa maapula variyaa
variyaa maamane variyaa
enna thottu pottu pogaama
kattikittu pogathan

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song Naan Soodana Mogini expresses themes of joy and celebration, capturing the essence of youthful exuberance.

What is the context of the song in the movie?

In Paayum Puli, this song showcases a lively moment that emphasizes the characters' happiness and camaraderie.

Who is the singer and music director of the song?

The song is sung by Jyoti Nooran and composed by D Imman.

When was the song released?

Naan Soodana Mogini was released on September 4, 2015.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Naan Soodana Mogini, the vibrant energy of Jyoti Nooran's voice brings to life a celebration of joy and togetherness. The song plays during a pivotal moment in Paayum Puli, where the characters revel in their happiness. With its catchy beats and lively lyrics, it evokes feelings of excitement and festivity. This track is a perfect anthem for parties and celebrations, making it a memorable addition to the film's soundtrack.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Naan Soodana Mogini from the Paayum Puli soundtrack is a vibrant celebration of life and energy. With Jyoti Nooran's captivating vocals and D Imman's infectious beats, this song is sure to get you moving. Experience the magic of Tamil music that perfectly blends tradition with modern flair!
stanzaMeanings: I am a beautiful girl who doesn't need anyone's help (2)

I am a beautiful girl who doesn't need anyone's help (2)
The fruit is ripe in the garden. If you eat the fruit, there is no rule.
There is a good dish in the shop. If you eat the golden girl, there is no rule.
Even if you write a complaint, I won't come. Even if you ask with a knife, I won't give.
The traditional dance was created by us, but we can't sell it to you (2)
I am a beautiful girl who doesn't need anyone's help.
There are a thousand who love me, but there is a problem that holds me back.
You have a wish, but I have a desire, and my first man is this dance.
I won't come to the kitchen for the girl, I won't give you a child.
